title: Prop X delivery fee cap
prompt: San Francisco is voting on a measure that would cap food delivery app fees (DoorDash, Uber Eats) at 15%. As a resident, would you vote Yes or No? Give your single most important reason in one sentence.

responses.response: I would vote yes because the cap would help local restaurants stay in business.
responses.reason: The cap would directly benefit local restaurants in my neighborhood, many of which are struggling to stay afloat due to these high fees and increasing rents in San Francisco.
